g.text: He got lost in the woods
Tap the correct answer to fix it
Continues to typing the full sentence →
A puppy gets lost and finds his way home
WANTED: To find his way home 🏠
BUT: Got lost in the woods 🌲
THEN: Lily found and hugged him 🤗
"Max the puppy wanted to find his way home, but he got lost
in the woods, so he followed familiar smells, and then Lily
A girl's kite breaks and a friend helps fix it

BUT: The wind broke her kite 💨
THEN: Kite flew higher than ever 🪁⬆️
"Luna wanted to fly her red kite, but the wind broke her kite,

A small turtle wins a race against bigger animals
SO: Kept walking, never gave up 🚶
"Tito the turtle wanted to win the Forest Race, but the other
animals were faster, so he kept walking and never gave up,
and then he crossed the finish line first."
